caption: A man with dark skin, wearing glasses and a humorous grey wig that stands upright, sits in a podcast studio. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red and white patterned bow tie and wears black over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone, and his mouth is slightly open as he speaks. In the background, several framed photographs hang on the wall, and clothing items, including a black vest on a mannequin and garments with the "LEE" logo, are visible. To his left and right, logos with the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" appear on the screen. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, with subtle changes in his facial expression and mouth movements as he continues to talk.
